tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting impaired glucose tolerance or prediabetes. Creatinine is slightly low, which is generally not clinically significant. Chloride is marginally elevated and CO₂ is mildly decreased, which may indicate a mild metabolic acidosis or compensation. Other parameters are within normal limits. Clinical correlation is recommended.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
